name: Command R
archDisplay: Dense transformer (35B), optimized for RAG and multi-step tool use
note: 35B RAG/tool-use model with 128K context; first open-weights (CC-BY-NC) Command release, later superseded by the 08-2024 refresh.
verificationNotes: Confirmed via huggingface.co/CohereLabs/c4ai-command-r-v01 (35B params, 128K context, CC-BY-NC + Acceptable Use Policy license, 10 optimized languages plus 13 more pretrained) and cohere.com/blog/command-r (blog post titled 'Command R: Retrieval-Augmented Generation at Production Scale' dated March 11, 2024, matching the release date). Pricing $0.5/$1.5 corroborated independently (Command-R Mar'24 rate). No changes.
